title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 With Improved Reasoning
summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5, claiming significant improvements in reasoning and coding tasks.
claude_summary: OpenAI launched GPT-5, its most capable model yet, with major gains in multi-step reasoning and software development tasks.

title: Federal Reserve Holds Rates Steady, Signals Two Cuts in 2026
summary: The Federal Reserve kept the federal funds rate unchanged while projecting two quarter-point cuts later this year.
claude_summary: The Fed held rates steady and signaled two 25bp cuts in 2026, citing cooling inflation and a resilient labor market.

title: Major Ransomware Attack Targets US Hospital Networks
summary: A coordinated ransomware campaign disrupted operations at dozens of US hospitals, forcing some to divert emergency patients.
claude_summary: Ransomware attackers hit 40+ US hospitals in a coordinated campaign, forcing emergency diversions and raising concerns about healthcare infrastructure resilience.

title: Minnesota Legislature Passes Historic Housing Bill
summary: The Minnesota state legislature passed a sweeping housing reform bill aimed at reducing construction costs and expanding affordable housing.
claude_summary: Minnesota passed a major housing reform bill removing zoning barriers statewide, projected to add 50,000 units over 5 years.

title: Anthropic Releases Claude 4.6 With Extended Context Window
summary: Anthropic released Claude 4.6 with a 2M token context window and improved instruction following across long documents.
claude_summary: Anthropic's Claude 4.6 extends context to 2M tokens and improves long-document comprehension, putting pressure on OpenAI's context offerings.

title: S&P 500 Hits Record High on Strong Earnings Season
summary: The S&P 500 closed at an all-time high as technology and financial sector earnings exceeded analyst expectations.
claude_summary: S&P 500 hit 6,200 for the first time as Q1 earnings from tech and financials beat estimates by an average of 8%.

title: XKCD #3021: Recursive Acronym
summary: The GNU in GNU stands for GNU's Not Unix, making it a recursive acronym. This comic extends the joke.
xkcd_alt: GNU stands for GNU's Not Unix, which stands for GNU's Not Unix's Not Unix, which...
claude_summary: XKCD explores recursive acronyms with characteristic wit. The alt text alone is worth the click.

title: Acquired: The NVIDIA Episode (Part 3)
summary: Ben and David conclude their three-part deep dive into NVIDIA's dominance in AI compute infrastructure.
claude_summary: Acquired wraps its NVIDIA trilogy with a look at how Jensen Huang positioned the company for the AI era — required listening for anyone in tech.

title: New Zero-Day in OpenSSH Allows Remote Code Execution
summary: Security researchers disclosed a critical zero-day in OpenSSH allowing unauthenticated remote code execution on Linux servers.
claude_summary: Critical OpenSSH zero-day (CVE-2026-XXXX) enables unauthenticated RCE on unpatched Linux servers — patch immediately.

title: SpaceX Starship Completes First Orbital Mission
summary: SpaceX's Starship successfully completed its first orbital mission, marking a milestone for the next generation of space exploration.
claude_summary: SpaceX achieved full orbital flight for Starship, successfully deploying a test payload and returning the booster to the launch site.

title: GitHub Copilot Now Suggests Entire Pull Requests
summary: GitHub announced Copilot can now analyze an issue, write all necessary code changes, create a branch, and open a pull request autonomously.
claude_summary: GitHub Copilot's agentic mode can now take an issue from brief to open PR autonomously, competing directly with Devin and similar AI dev agents.

title: EU Parliament Votes to Strengthen AI Act Enforcement
summary: The European Parliament voted to increase enforcement powers and fines under the AI Act, targeting high-risk AI systems.
claude_summary: EU Parliament toughened AI Act enforcement with fines up to 6% of global revenue for high-risk violations, effective 2027.

title: Bambu Lab Releases Open Source Firmware for A1 Series
summary: Bambu Lab announced open source firmware for its A1 series printers following community pressure, reversing its closed-ecosystem stance.
claude_summary: Bambu Lab reversed course and open-sourced its A1 firmware after sustained community backlash — a win for the maker ecosystem.

title: Treasury Yields Surge on Strong Jobs Report
summary: US 10-year Treasury yields climbed to 4.6% after a stronger-than-expected jobs report reduced expectations for near-term rate cuts.
claude_summary: 10-year yields hit 4.6% as February payrolls came in 85k above consensus, pushing rate-cut expectations to Q4 2026.

title: Leaked Documents Reveal NSA Surveillance Expansion
summary: Leaked classified documents indicate the NSA significantly expanded domestic surveillance capabilities under a little-known executive order.
claude_summary: Leaked NSA documents reveal a quiet expansion of domestic surveillance, raising civil liberties concerns ahead of mid-term elections.

title: Dune: Messiah Film Adaptation Officially Greenlit
summary: Warner Bros. officially greenlit a film adaptation of Frank Herbert's Dune: Messiah, with Denis Villeneuve returning to direct.
claude_summary: Dune: Messiah is officially happening with Villeneuve returning — production targets a 2028 release.

title: a16z AI Podcast: The State of Inference at Scale
summary: This week's episode explores the infrastructure economics of serving large language models at scale.
claude_summary: a16z digs into the infrastructure cost battle between model providers as inference becomes commoditized.

title: Google DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 Predicts Protein-Drug Interactions
summary: Google DeepMind released AlphaFold 3, which can predict how proteins interact with small molecule drugs — a breakthrough for pharmaceutical research.
claude_summary: AlphaFold 3 extends protein structure prediction to drug-protein interactions, potentially compressing pharmaceutical discovery timelines by years.

title: Succession Spiritual Sequel Announced at HBO
summary: HBO announced a spiritual successor to Succession from creator Jesse Armstrong, set in the world of sovereign wealth funds.
claude_summary: Jesse Armstrong returns to HBO with a Succession-adjacent series about sovereign wealth fund power struggles — pilot ordered.

title: Ukraine Drone Strike Hits Russian Oil Refinery
summary: Ukraine launched a long-range drone strike targeting a major Russian oil refinery, disrupting fuel supplies ahead of winter.
claude_summary: Ukrainian drones struck a Saratov-region refinery processing ~180k bbl/day, potentially tightening global diesel supply.
